# Planning Coverage Checklist

## Purpose
This document serves as the **"no gaps" control plane** ensuring every mandatory planning document is present, complete, and approved before phase gates. It provides a systematic verification framework to prevent incomplete planning from derailing project execution. Use this document to:
- Verify document completeness before phase transitions
- Track approval status of all required deliverables
- Identify gaps in planning coverage early
- Provide audit trail of phase gate readiness
- Ensure consistent quality across all project documentation

## Instructions
1. **Baseline:** Review the checklist at project initiation to understand requirements
2. **Track:** Update status as documents are created and approved
3. **Verify:** Use this checklist as the official phase gate entry criteria
4. **Escalate:** Flag missing or incomplete items before phase transitions
5. **Archive:** Maintain as record of phase gate compliance

---

### 2.2 Document Status Legend

| Status | Definition | Action Required |
|---|---|---|
| **Not Started** | Document not yet created | Create document using template |
| **Draft** | Document in progress | Continue development |
| **In Review** | Document under review | Address feedback |
| **Approved** | Document approved but not yet finalized | Finalize and publish |
| **Complete** | Document complete and approved | No action |
| **N/A** | Not applicable to this project | Document why in notes |

## 3. PHASE GATE CHECKLISTS

### 3.1 Discovery Gate (Required for Build Start)

**Objective:** Verify that discovery is complete and requirements are understood before commencing build.

#### Required Documents
- [ ] [01_SOW.md](../01_commercial/01_SOW.md) - Executed and signed
- [ ] [04_REQUIREMENTS_SPEC.md](../03_discovery/04_REQUIREMENTS_SPEC.md) - Approved baseline
- [ ] [08_TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md](../03_discovery/08_TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md) - Initial mapping complete
- [ ] [01_PROJECT_CHARTER.md](../02_governance/01_PROJECT_CHARTER.md) - Approved
- [ ] [02_ASSUMPTIONS_CONSTRAINTS.md](./02_ASSUMPTIONS_CONSTRAINTS.md) - Baseline established
- [ ] [04_RISK_REGISTER.md](./04_RISK_REGISTER.md) - Initial risks identified

#### Verification Checklist
- [ ] All stakeholders have reviewed and approved requirements
- [ ] Requirements traceability matrix shows coverage of all SOW deliverables
- [ ] Critical assumptions have been validated
- [ ] High-priority risks have mitigation plans
- [ ] Budget approved and allocated
- [ ] Team resources assigned
- [ ] Technical approach validated by architect

**Gate Approval:**

| Client Sponsor | [[NAME]] | _______________ | [[DATE]] |
| Technical Lead | [[NAME]] | _______________ | [[DATE]] |

**Objective:** Verify that architecture is defined and approved before infrastructure provisioning.

#### Required Documents

- [ ] [07_NON_FUNCTIONAL_SPECS.md](../04_architecture/07_NON_FUNCTIONAL_SPECS.md) - Performance requirements set

#### Verification Checklist
- [ ] Architecture reviewed and approved by technical stakeholders
- [ ] Security review completed with no critical findings
- [ ] Data classification applied to all data elements
- [ ] Non-functional requirements are measurable and testable
- [ ] Infrastructure requirements documented
- [ ] Integration points identified and validated
- [ ] Disaster recovery requirements defined

### 3.3 Readiness Gate (Required for UAT)

**Objective:** Verify that system is ready for user acceptance testing.

#### Required Documents
- [ ] [01_TEST_STRATEGY.md](../06_delivery_quality/01_TEST_STRATEGY.md) - Strategy approved
- [ ] [08_TEST_CASE_CATALOG.md](../06_delivery_quality/08_TEST_CASE_CATALOG.md) - Tests prepared

- [ ] [01_OWNER_OPERATOR_GUIDE.md](../08_enablement/01_OWNER_OPERATOR_GUIDE.md) - Documentation complete

#### Verification Checklist
- [ ] All functional requirements have test cases
- [ ] Unit test coverage meets minimum threshold (80%)
- [ ] Integration tests passing
- [ ] Security scan completed with no critical vulnerabilities
- [ ] Performance testing meets NFRs
- [ ] UAT environment provisioned and stable
- [ ] Test data prepared and validated
- [ ] UAT users identified and trained
- [ ] Defect tracking process established
